self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Many Oaths of Dawn and Dusk (R1): Increases ATK by 20%. When party members obtain Elemental Shards from Crystallize or trigger Lunar-Crystallize reactions, the equipping character gains 1 Seal (max 2, 15s duration), each increasing Elemental Skill DMG by 18%. All Seals disappear 0.2s after the equipper's Elemental Skill deals DMG.
